name: Papa John's International, Inc.
description: Papa John's International, Inc. is a prominent American pizza restaurant chain that operates and franchises a global network of delivery and carryout restaurants. Founded in 1984, the company has grown to become one of the world's largest pizza delivery brands, with thousands of locations across approximately 50 countries and territories. Headquartered in the United States, Papa John's is recognized for its commitment to quality ingredients and its extensive use of both company-owned and franchised restaurant models to distribute its products to a diverse international customer base.
